# Stakeholder Review Checklist

Use this checklist to prepare for and conduct structured stakeholder reviews at key project phase gates. The **Project Manager** facilitates the review; the **Business Analyst** prepares the materials; the **Stakeholder** provides feedback and approval.

Typical review points: end of Initiation, end of Planning, before Release, and at project close.

---

## Before the Review

### Preparation (Project Manager & Business Analyst)
- [ ] Review purpose and agenda confirmed and distributed at least 2 business days in advance
- [ ] Materials for review compiled (one-pager, requirements, demo, release notes, metrics, etc.)
- [ ] Open issues or decisions requiring stakeholder input are clearly listed
- [ ] Any prerequisite approvals or sign-offs from prior gates are confirmed
- [ ] Meeting invite sent with agenda, materials, and pre-read time noted

### Stakeholder Briefing
- [ ] Stakeholders notified of review scope and what decisions are expected from them
- [ ] Any background context or pre-reading shared in advance
- [ ] Key contacts confirmed as able to attend (or delegate confirmed)

---

## During the Review

- [ ] Agenda followed; facilitator keeps the meeting on time
- [ ] Deliverables for this phase presented clearly
- [ ] Progress against success metrics and acceptance criteria shared
- [ ] Open risks and issues surfaced to stakeholders
- [ ] Stakeholder questions answered or parked with a follow-up owner and date
- [ ] Explicit go/no-go or approval decision sought from stakeholders
- [ ] Any changes to scope, timeline, or resources discussed and agreed upon

---

## After the Review

- [ ] Meeting notes and decisions documented and distributed within 1 business day
- [ ] Action items captured with owner, description, and due date
- [ ] Formal approval or sign-off recorded (email, comment in issue/PR, or document signature)
- [ ] Next steps and phase transition communicated to the delivery team
- [ ] Project charter, backlog, or release plan updated to reflect any changes agreed

---

## Review Outcome

| Phase Gate | Decision | Approved by | Date |
|---|---|---|---|
| Initiation complete / Planning approved | ☐ Approved ☐ Deferred ☐ Rejected | | |
| Planning complete / Execution approved | ☐ Approved ☐ Deferred ☐ Rejected | | |
| Release candidate approved | ☐ Approved ☐ Deferred ☐ Rejected | | |
| Project close / Retrospective reviewed | ☐ Approved ☐ Deferred ☐ Rejected | | |

---

**Owner:** Project Manager (facilitation); Business Analyst (materials)  
**Reviewers / Approvers:** Project Stakeholder, Product Manager  
**Reference:** [Roles & Personas](../octoacme-roles-and-personas.md) | [Project Initiation](../octoacme-project-initiation.md)
